content: Newcastle United defender Kieran Trippier has an open mind about his next move as he focuses on finishing his St James' Park stay on a high.

zh.title: 基朗·特里皮尔接下来会怎样？
zh.summary: 纽卡斯尔联队后卫基朗·特里皮尔仍未决定其在现任俱乐部之外的未来，保持开放态度，同时优先考虑在圣詹姆斯公园的强势表现。这位资深后卫的立场表明他将在转会窗口期间评估可用的机会。

title: Quiz: Name all the clubs who have won La Liga
summary: Nine clubs have won Spain's La Liga since 1929; this quiz tests knowledge of all the winners in the competition's history.
content: Nine clubs have won Spain's La Liga since the competition began in 1929. Can you name them all?

zh.title: 测试：列举所有赢得西甲冠军的俱乐部
zh.summary: 自1929年以来，9家俱乐部赢得过西班牙西甲联赛冠军；这项测试考查你对该赛事历史上所有冠军的了解。

title: How could extreme weather affect World Cup 2026?
summary: As the 2026 World Cup approaches, extreme weather conditions in North America could disrupt matches and significantly impact the tournament this summer.
content: With almost a month to go until the start of the World Cup, Simon King looks ahead to the weather's potential to disrupt the tournament this summer.

zh.title: 极端天气如何影响2026年世界杯？
zh.summary: 随着2026年世界杯临近，北美的极端天气条件可能会中断比赛，并对今年夏季的赛事产生重大影响。
